specialtiesKey: Boat Surveying & Inspection,Diving & Underwater Services,Marine AC & Climate Control,Marine Plumbing & Sanitation

content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Running Season After Season
content.about:
Ben's Boatworks is a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition no matter the season. We offer a comprehensive range of specialized marine services, and we've built a solid reputation among boat owners who need reliable, knowledgeable hands on their boat — not just a quick fix.

Our team handles everything from thorough boat surveying and inspection to diving and underwater services, marine AC and climate control, and marine plumbing and sanitation. Whether you're buying a used vessel and need a pre-purchase survey, dealing with a fouled hull, troubleshooting a chilled water system, or sorting out a holding tank issue, we've got the experience to get it done right. We take these systems seriously because we know how much they matter when you're out on the water.

We serve boat owners across South Florida and the surrounding coastal communities, working within a 60-mile radius to bring professional marine services directly to your slip or yard. From the marinas along the Chesapeake Bay corridor to the waterways throughout the region, Ben's Boatworks is the crew you can count on. Your boat represents a significant investment, and we treat it that way — with the attention, care, and expertise it deserves.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, diving services, marine AC & plumbing across South Florida. Call us today!

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: A professional boat survey provides a thorough evaluation of a vessel's structural integrity, mechanical systems, and overall condition. Whether it's a pre-purchase inspection or an insurance survey, detailed documentation helps buyers and owners make informed decisions and avoid costly surprises down the line.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Underwater diving services cover hull inspections, propeller checks, zinc replacement, line and debris removal, and bottom cleaning without the need to haul the vessel. Keeping a hull clean and hardware in good shape below the waterline directly affects performance, fuel efficiency, and long-term boat health.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: Marine air conditioning and climate control systems require specialized knowledge of chilled water systems, self-contained units, and the unique demands of a saltwater environment. Proper installation, routine maintenance, and timely repairs keep onboard temperatures comfortable and prevent system failures during peak boating season.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: Marine plumbing and sanitation work includes installation, repair, and maintenance of holding tanks, through-hulls, seacocks, bilge pumps, and freshwater systems. Properly functioning sanitation systems are critical for both vessel safety and environmental compliance, and even small leaks or blockages can escalate quickly if left unaddressed.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full condition inspection report
Underwater hull cleaning and zinc anode replacement
Marine AC system repair and seasonal maintenance service
Holding tank installation and sanitation system overhaul
Propeller inspection and debris removal via dive service
Through-hull and seacock inspection, repair, or replacement
